templates.name: Dependency Service SLI Breach in Customer Region
templates.template: Dependency service '{dependency_service_name}' has SLI '{slo_sli_id}' breached in region '{region}' — a region where the primary customer has resources. {impacted_subscriptions} subscriptions and {impacted_resources} resources affected. Impact window: {earliest_impact_start} – {latest_impact_end} ({total_impact_duration_min} min). Avg value: {avg_value_across_windows}. This is a leading indicator of potential customer impact.
templates.extracted_when: A dependency service's SLI is breached in at least one region where the primary customer has monitored resources. Even a single SLI breach in a customer region warrants attention since it signals the platform service the customer depends on is degraded.

templates.name: Multiple SLI Breach for Dependency Service in Customer Region
templates.template: Dependency service '{dependency_service_name}' has {sli_count} distinct SLIs breached in region '{region}': {sli_list}. {total_impacted_subscriptions} subscriptions and {total_impacted_resources} resources affected. Multiple SLI breaches in the same dependency service indicate broad service-level degradation, not a single-SLI anomaly — elevated risk for the primary customer.
templates.extracted_when: Multiple distinct SLIs from the same dependency service are breached in the same customer region. This pattern indicates the dependency service is experiencing broad degradation across multiple functional areas.

templates.name: Multiple Dependency Services Degraded in Customer Region
templates.template: Region '{region}' has {dep_count} dependency services degraded: {dep_list}. Combined: {distinct_sli_count} SLIs breached, {total_impacted_subscriptions} subscriptions, {total_impacted_resources} resources affected. Multiple dependency services failing in the same customer region indicates a broad regional platform issue — resource exhaustion, infrastructure failure, or cascading dependency chain.
templates.extracted_when: Two or more distinct dependency services show SLI breaches in the same customer region. This is the strongest dependency signal — it suggests the regional platform infrastructure is under stress.
